description: Declared-baseline currency made machine-evaluable (FEAT-011 criterion 6 / shape S5+S6): (i) research stale_conditions items additively admit typed variants alongside bare strings — at minimum {kind:'item-status', id, bucket} (fires when the named item's status buckets there), {kind:'file-changed', path, baseline_hash} and {kind:'revision-moved', ref} shapes — free text stays legal and human-only; (ii) path-bearing citations (research citations[], gap evidence[]) capture a content_hash pin at the write choke (computeFileContentHash; self-gated on field presence, mirroring identity-stamp gating); (iii) validateContext flags a complete research item whose typed condition fired or whose citation pin drifted as a staleness CANDIDATE (warning) — the complete-to-stale transition is applied by context-reconcile (whose sweep this task extends) or a human, never silently; (iv) anchor-drift flagging for gap evidence pins is the same mechanism (prose residue: the flag says re-review, never rewrites). Schema changes are additive (oneOf on condition items; optional pin fields) — existing data validates unchanged; dual-surfaced live + catalog. Composed from FEAT-011 criteria 6 and 9 and shape report S5/S6 (LLM-composed under that basis).
acceptance_criteria: A complete research item carrying {kind:'item-status', id, bucket} whose named item buckets there is flagged by context-validate as a staleness candidate; a bare-string condition is never machine-judged; the R-0012 case ({item-status, FGAP-066, complete}) is expressible and fires against the live substrate.

A path-bearing citation written through the sanctioned path carries a content pin; validate flags a pinned citation whose file hash drifted; items without pins validate unchanged (additive; no data migration).
context-reconcile's sweep includes fired conditions + pin drifts, applying the complete-to-stale transition only there or by hand — validate itself never mutates.
Both schema changes pass the expand-contract/narrowing gates and land dual-surface; full suite 0 failures; CHANGELOG entry.
notes: FEAT-011 T6 (shape S5+S6). Depends on the reconcile op task (extends its sweep).
